validCodes.title: 10% Takesies Backsies
validCodes.message:
You're officially in the 'takesie, backsie' club! 🎭

Redemption Reward: One (1) free pizza of your choice from any chain. Remember to bring your appetite!

validCodes.title: 24 hour No Touchy
validCodes.message:
Touch me, and I'll be gone! 💨

Redemption Reward: A mysterious box of snacks. What's inside? The suspense is the reward!

validCodes.title: Leet Speak Legend
validCodes.message:
Hello, 1337! 🕶️

Redemption Reward: Title of 'Lord of the Code' for one week. Wear it proudly (or hide your face).

validCodes.title: Best Friends Forever
validCodes.message:
The truest code of all! ❤️

Redemption Reward: Unlimited 'who wants to hang out' privileges for the next 30 days.
